requirement_topic.en: URSEA / UTE Grid Connection — Microgeneration, Distributed Generation, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: URSEA / UTE并网——微发电、分布式发电、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: URSEA / UTE併網——微發電、分散式發電、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Uruguay solar PV inverters used in grid-connected microgeneration or distributed-generation projects must be handled through the Uruguay regulatory and utility framework: URSEA regulation and UTE interconnection review, metering, protection, and commissioning procedures. Uruguay's public low-voltage supply is 50 Hz with 230/400 V service, which is closer to China's frequency than many American markets but still requires UTE-specific voltage, frequency, reconnection, anti-islanding, and protection settings. IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 photovoltaic utility-interface evidence are practical baseline documents for inverter submissions, together with the applicable UNIT-adopted standards and current URSEA/UTE project rules.
summary.zh: 用于并网微发电或分布式发电项目的乌拉圭太阳能光伏逆变器，须按照乌拉圭监管和公用事业框架处理：URSEA监管以及UTE接入审查、计量、保护和调试程序。乌拉圭公共低压供电为50 Hz、230/400 V，在频率上比许多美洲市场更接近中国，但仍需符合UTE特定的电压、频率、重连、防孤岛和保护整定。IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727光伏公用电网接口证据，是逆变器提交文件的实务基线，并应结合适用的UNIT采纳标准及现行URSEA/UTE项目规则。
summary.zht: 用於併網微發電或分散式發電項目的烏拉圭太陽能光伏逆變器，須按照烏拉圭監管和公用事業框架處理：URSEA監管以及UTE接入審查、計量、保護和調試程序。烏拉圭公共低壓供電為50 Hz、230/400 V，在頻率上比許多美洲市場更接近中國，但仍需符合UTE特定的電壓、頻率、重連、防孤島和保護整定。IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727光伏公用電網介面證據，是逆變器提交文件的實務基線，並應結合適用的UNIT採納標準及現行URSEA/UTE項目規則。

standards_or_laws: URSEA distributed-generation and microgeneration regulatory framework for Uruguay electricity connections
UTE grid-connection, metering, protection, and commissioning procedures for microgeneration and distributed generation
Decreto 173/010 — Uruguay microgeneration / net-metering legacy framework, subject to later updates
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and domestic anti-islanding or grid-support test reports. These documents are prepared for Chinese grid operators and Chinese grid conditions. China also uses 50 Hz, which reduces frequency mismatch, but Chinese documentation does not establish compliance with URSEA rules, UTE connection procedures, UNIT-adopted IEC standards, or UTE-specific protection settings for Uruguay projects.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408以及国内防孤岛或电网支撑测试报告。这些文件面向中国电网企业和中国电网条件。中国同样使用50 Hz，可降低频率差异，但中国文件不能证明符合乌拉圭URSEA规则、UTE接入程序、UNIT采纳的IEC标准或UTE特定保护整定。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408以及國內防孤島或電網支撐測試報告。這些文件面向中國電網企業和中國電網條件。中國同樣使用50 Hz，可降低頻率差異，但中國文件不能證明符合烏拉圭URSEA規則、UTE接入程序、UNIT採納的IEC標準或UTE特定保護整定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese grid certificates do not transfer to Uruguay UTE grid-connection acceptance. Exporters should prepare model-specific IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, a firmware parameter sheet for Uruguay 230/400 V at 50 Hz service, UTE protection-setting documentation, and any UNIT conformity evidence requested by the project owner or installer. For microgeneration, confirm whether the project falls under the Decreto 173/010 legacy net-metering framework or later URSEA/UTE distributed-generation updates.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证书不能转移为乌拉圭UTE并网接受。出口商应准备特定型号的IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、适用于乌拉圭230/400 V 50 Hz供电的固件参数表、UTE保护整定文件，以及项目业主或安装商要求的任何UNIT合格评定证据。对于微发电项目，应确认项目适用Decreto 173/010既有净计量框架，还是后续URSEA/UTE分布式发电更新规则。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證書不能轉移為烏拉圭UTE併網接受。出口商應準備特定型號的IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、適用於烏拉圭230/400 V 50 Hz供電的韌體參數表、UTE保護整定文件，以及項目業主或安裝商要求的任何UNIT合格評定證據。對於微發電項目，應確認項目適用Decreto 173/010既有淨計量框架，還是後續URSEA/UTE分散式發電更新規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for Uruguay grid-tied PV projects: URSEA/UTE rules and UTE connection approval are project gates before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese project requirements but does not transfer to Uruguay URSEA/UTE project approval

source.publisher: UTE (Administracion Nacional de Usinas y Transmisiones Electricas)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uruguay's 50 Hz / 230-400 V grid reduces frequency mismatch with China, but it does not make Chinese GB/T grid evidence automatically acceptable. Treat UTE grid-connection approval, UTE protection settings, and URSEA distributed-generation or microgeneration rules as separate gates. Obtain IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence for the exact inverter model and confirm the current UTE submission package before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌拉圭50 Hz / 230-400 V电网降低了与中国的频率差异，但并不意味着中国GB/T并网证据会被自动接受。应将UTE并网批准、UTE保护整定以及URSEA分布式发电或微发电规则视为独立门槛。请为特定逆变器型号取得IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并在出货前确认现行UTE提交文件包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏拉圭50 Hz / 230-400 V電網降低了與中國的頻率差異，但並不意味著中國GB/T併網證據會被自動接受。應將UTE併網批准、UTE保護整定以及URSEA分散式發電或微發電規則視為獨立門檻。請為特定逆變器型號取得IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並在出貨前確認現行UTE提交文件包。

requirement_topic.en: Uruguay Renewable Grid Context — High Renewable Share Does Not Waive Connection Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 乌拉圭可再生电网背景——高可再生占比不免除并网证据
requirement_topic.zht: 烏拉圭可再生電網背景——高可再生占比不免除併網證據

summary.en: Uruguay's electricity system is widely reported as having a very high renewable share, commonly around 90-98% depending on hydro and wind conditions. That context can make solar procurement attractive, but it does not remove technical entry requirements for grid-tied inverters. UTE remains the vertically integrated utility and grid operator for interconnection practice, while URSEA provides the energy regulatory framework. Grid-tied PV equipment still needs project-level review for protection settings, metering, anti-islanding, commissioning, and conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭电力系统通常被报道为可再生能源占比很高，常见范围约为90-98%，具体取决于水电和风电条件。该背景可能提升太阳能采购吸引力，但不会免除并网逆变器的技术准入要求。UTE仍是垂直一体化公用事业和电网运营方，负责接入实务；URSEA提供能源监管框架。并网光伏设备仍需进行项目层面的保护整定、计量、防孤岛、调试和合格评定证据审查。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭電力系統通常被報導為可再生能源占比很高，常見範圍約為90-98%，具體取決於水電和風電條件。該背景可能提升太陽能採購吸引力，但不會免除併網逆變器的技術准入要求。UTE仍是垂直一體化公用事業和電網運營方，負責接入實務；URSEA提供能源監管框架。併網光伏設備仍需進行項目層面的保護整定、計量、防孤島、調試和合格評定證據審查。

standards_or_laws: URSEA energy regulatory framework for Uruguay electricity services
UTE electricity service and grid-connection procedures
UNIT standards and conformity-assessment framework for Uruguay

summary.en: Chinese project approvals, domestic grid-operator acceptance, and CQC/CGC voluntary certificates may support technical due diligence but do not provide Uruguay project approval. The China-side documents should be treated as source evidence to be mapped against UNIT, URSEA, UTE, and IEC requirements, not as substitutes for Uruguay connection or conformity decisions.
summary.zh: 中国项目审批、国内电网企业验收以及CQC/CGC自愿性证书可支持技术尽调，但不构成乌拉圭项目批准。中国侧文件应作为映射至UNIT、URSEA、UTE和IEC要求的基础证据，而非乌拉圭接入或合格评定决定的替代品。
summary.zht: 中國項目審批、國內電網企業驗收以及CQC/CGC自願性證書可支持技術盡調，但不構成烏拉圭項目批准。中國側文件應作為映射至UNIT、URSEA、UTE和IEC要求的基礎證據，而非烏拉圭接入或合格評定決定的替代品。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Market context does not equal compliance. Even where an inverter is technically mature in China, Uruguay projects need local installer and utility review, model-specific IEC evidence, UTE settings, and confirmation of the applicable URSEA/UTE pathway for the project size and connection type.
gap.zh: 差距：市场背景不等于合规。即使逆变器在中国已技术成熟，乌拉圭项目仍需要本地安装商和公用事业审查、特定型号IEC证据、UTE参数设置，以及按项目容量和接入类型确认适用的URSEA/UTE路径。
gap.zht: 差距：市場背景不等於合規。即使逆變器在中國已技術成熟，烏拉圭項目仍需要本地安裝商和公用事業審查、特定型號IEC證據、UTE參數設置，以及按項目容量和接入類型確認適用的URSEA/UTE路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice at project level: URSEA/UTE pathway and UTE energisation requirements must be satisfied before a grid-tied PV inverter can operate
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic approval is not a Uruguay energisation approval

source.publisher: URSEA (Unidad Reguladora de Servicios de Energia y Agua)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uruguay's high-renewable grid context should not be read as a waiver of inverter conformity, protection, or connection review. Confirm the current URSEA/UTE path for the specific project size and connection type, and document UTE-compatible firmware and metering arrangements before procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌拉圭高可再生电网背景不应被解读为免除逆变器合格评定、保护或接入审查。请按具体项目容量和接入类型确认现行URSEA/UTE路径，并在采购前记录与UTE兼容的固件和计量安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏拉圭高可再生電網背景不應被解讀為免除逆變器合格評定、保護或接入審查。請按具體項目容量和接入類型確認現行URSEA/UTE路徑，並在採購前記錄與UTE相容的韌體和計量安排。
